name: Crux
description: Both diagonals of the grid picked out in morphing tiles, with stray dots scattered off-axis — a study of the @match selector.

code.style: --rule: ( --ink: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --br: @p(0%, 14%, 50%); --sc: @r(0.6, 1); margin: 1px; transition: ease 500ms; @match(x == y) { background: @var(--ink); border-radius: @var(--br); transform: scale(@var(--sc)); } @match(X - x + 1 == y) { background: @var(--ink); border-radius: @var(--br); transform: scale(@var(--sc)); } @random(${speckleFrequency}) { background: var(--color4); border-radius: 50%; transform: scale(0.35); } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
